\tzpentry{ID3605}{Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3605 introduces Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_M = \int_V \vec{A} \cdot \vec{B} \, d^3r - \frac{\omega_{\text{gyro}}}{c^2} \int_V \vec{r} \times (\vec{E} \times \vec{B}) \, d^3r \end{equation}
